name: profiles/active.sh emits the profile precedence snapshot used in lock contracts when invoked with snapshot
command: mkdir -p profiles && printf 'rules:\n  no-eval: error\n' > profiles/p.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/profiles/active.sh" --snapshot profiles/p.yaml --out snapshot.json 2>err.txt && grep -q '"profile_snapshot_hash"' snapshot.json && echo ok 1>&2
